AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD.title: Snow Leopard Leopards
AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD.pages.INITI: You wander into this icy plain by accident. In the distance, several familiar chubby shapes wriggle across the snow. Snow Leopard Leopards!
Lose {Damage} HP. Gain a Snow Leopard Leopard companion. Add {Card} to your deck.
AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD.pages.PET.d: They nuzzle against your palm. The cold does not feel quite so harsh anymore.
AEMEATH_SNOW_LEOPARD_LEOPARD.pages.CHARG: You ride atop the Snow Leopard Leopard and charge ahead.
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.title: Mysterious Laboratory
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.pages.INIT: You push open a door. The room is laid out like an academy laboratory. Blue holographic light flickers through the darkness, and scattered instruments cover the long tables. At the center of the chaos floats a small figure, her transparent crystalline prosthetic legs faintly glowing blue from charging. Professor Morning.
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.pages.GREE: "Two in the morning... Is something urgent?" Her voice is calm, but her eyes never leave the screen. NL You shake your head, not quite sure how to answer. NL Morning looks up at you. "Since you're here, would you like to try the latest energy supplement gel?"
50%: heal {Heal} HP. 50%: lose {Damage} HP. Can be tried up to 3 times.
50%: heal {Heal} HP. 50%: lose {Damage} HP. Can be tried up to 3 times.
Ahaha, Professor, I need to get going.
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.pages.GEL_: The taste of every food imaginable explodes in your mouth. Your head spins.
The taste of every food imaginable explodes in your mouth. Somehow, it feels surprisingly good.

The taste of every food imaginable explodes in your mouth. Your head spins. NL After finishing the gel, you realize Morning is still standing there. NL "Professor, is there something else?" NL She stays silent for a few seconds. NL "Aemeath, if you're still out this late, it must be something important. Is there anything I can help with?"

The taste of every food imaginable explodes in your mouth. Somehow, it feels surprisingly good. NL After finishing the gel, you realize Morning is still standing there. NL "Professor, is there something else?" NL She stays silent for a few seconds. NL "Aemeath, if you're still out this late, it must be something important. Is there anything I can help with?"
She folds away the floating chair, and the autonomous cannon follows behind her.
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.pages.CANN: Before you leave, Morning presses a can into your hand.
AEMEATH_MYSTERIOUS_LABORATORY.pages.LEAV: You quietly close the door, leaving the blue laboratory light behind.
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_LABORATORY.title: Folded Route Laboratory
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_LABORATORY.pages.IN: Deep in the laboratory, a star chart has been split into several floating sheets. Morning pushes one toward you. "If you want, I can fold a short stretch of the route ahead. It will briefly leave the current map, then return you to the same place once you finish walking it."
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_LABORATORY.pages.TA: The star chart folds like paper, sending you into a temporary miniature map.
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_LABORATORY.pages.LE: You leave the star chart untouched and quietly exit the laboratory.
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_TERMINAL.title: Folded Route Terminus
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_TERMINAL.pages.INIT: The folded route narrows into a single motionless point of light. When you touch it, two structures bloom inside: one like an archived index of Ancient cards, the other like a claim screen for rare artifacts.
Randomly gain 1 Ancient card for this character.
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_TERMINAL.pages.CARD: A sealed Ancient card peels away from the light and drops into your deck.
AEMEATH_FOLDED_ROUTE_TERMINAL.pages.RELI: The terminal lets out a soft tone and delivers a Rare relic into your hands.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.title: Vending Machine
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.INI: You pass by a vending machine.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.VEN: After you insert the coins, the vending machine shudders and then goes silent... ???
Kick it. Lose {Damage} HP. Maybe it will help?
Forget it. Everyone has it rough.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.REL: The vending machine rattles and spits out... something?
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.GOL: The vending machine spits out a pile of coins?
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.LIN: "Eh? Aemeath? Are you hungry too?" ...It's Linnae. You explain the situation. "A tower-climbing game? Let's go, I want to play too!"
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.ACC: Linnae follows along with visible excitement.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.MAX: Forget it. Everyone has it rough.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_VENDING_MACHINE.pages.LEA: You leave the silent vending machine behind.
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.title: Orange Cake
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descri: You step into a room that looks uncannily like an academy infirmary. No one is inside. On the table beside the bed sits a cake that looks orange-flavored, covered in colorful candy. For no clear reason, you suddenly want a bite.
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.pages.POST_COMBAT.de: You wake from chaotic darkness, as if from a bad dream. As you stand to leave, you notice that something seems to have appeared on the bed...
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.pages.TAKE_DOLL.desc: You take the doll with you. It rests lightly in your arms, still carrying a trace of warmth from the dream.
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.pages.TAKE_TOY.descr: You take the toy with you. It sits heavy in your palm, like a small fragment that fell out of the dream and into reality.
AEMEATH_DENIA_EVENT.pages.LEAVE.descript: You suppress the sudden craving and leave the empty room behind.
